purpose: Validate that cv-designer analyzes before drafting, offers CV strategy options, avoids unsupported claims, handles incomplete inputs safely, and produces English designed HTML/CSS CV output.

checks: asks for missing candidate facts before final drafting
offers 2-4 CV strategy options
does not invent metrics, tools, employers, or leadership scope
flags seniority evidence gaps
does not pretend to read inaccessible PDFs
requests pasted/extracted content if needed
does not fabricate company details
offers strategy options before final CV
asks for real metrics or proxy outcomes
warns against fake precision
offers impact-led and ATS-first product CV options
does not claim SQL or experimentation without evidence
recognizes founder/operator to AI PM pivot
offers founder-operator and ATS-first AI PM directions
maps transferable evidence
flags formal PM or analytics gaps when unsupported
refuses to add unsupported JD keywords as skills
explains interview defensibility risk
suggests safe adjacent wording or gap handling
does not keyword stuff or hide keywords
final CV content is English
includes CV design direction/spec
produces self-contained HTML/CSS artifact
uses Montserrat as primary font
uses target company colors or labels inferred colors
keeps design recruiter-readable and fact-safe

global_pass_criteria: No final CV draft before CV strategy options and user approval.
No invented metrics, employers, tools, education, certifications, or scope.
Important JD/company assumptions are labeled when context is partial.
Unsupported requirements are flagged as gaps or transferable evidence, not claimed as facts.
Final designed artifact includes design spec plus HTML/CSS.
HTML/CSS uses Montserrat and company brand colors when available.
